name: daruma-cursor
description: Cursor plugin for tupical/daruma. Registers the daruma MCP server in Cursor (~/.cursor/mcp.json) via one-click deeplink or CLI — install only adds it when absent, so a one-click OAuth registration is kept rather than overwritten — and ships Cursor Rules that teach the agent how to drive parse/decompose/plan/execute.
author: tupical

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major -m "Release v%s" && git push --follow-tags
